An '''Imperial research center''' was a deep [[Space station/Legends|space station]] created by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in remote places in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], particularly for complex research projects.

{{Ship-stub}}
